---
title: "A Country Gentleman of the Nineteenth Century: Being a Short Memoir of the Right Honourable Sir William Heathcote, Bart., of Hursley 1801-1881"
---

## A Country Gentleman of the Nineteenth Century: Being a Short Memoir of the Right Honourable Sir William Heathcote, Bart., of Hursley 1801-1881

**Author:** Frances Awdry
**Date:** 1906
**Imprint:** Winchester: Warren and London: Simpkin

### Notes

See also [[person:82]Frances Awdry].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
